markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss website migration, registry launch, and future content initiatives for FOSSA.](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site migration revealed redirect issues, particularly with blog URLs losing trailing slashes](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Registry launch plan: start with 9 live pages, then scale to 300,000 pages](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Content strategy to focus on competitive comparisons, vulnerability topics, and interactive experiences](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration Issues

  - [25 404 errors identified; 20 resolved, 3 pending, few scattered issues remain](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [SEMrush audit revealed redirect chains and loops, particularly with blog URLs](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Blog URLs lost trailing slashes post-migration, causing potential SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Non-blog pages maintained their URL structure (without trailing slashes)](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Action: GrowthX to investigate redirect loops, crawlability concerns, and provide detailed diagnosis](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

### Registry Launch Strategy

  - [300,000 pages ready, 9 currently live](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Plan: Index and optimize initial 9 pages, then scale production](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [GrowthX to evaluate page structure, content, and make SEO recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Consider leveraging Stack Share for logical cross-linking](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Develop sitemap strategy for manageable indexing by Google](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Explore external linking opportunities for early promotion](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### Content Initiatives

  - [Three main content buckets identified:](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
    1.  Competitive content (e.g., "FOSSA vs. Snyk")
    2.  OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (11 pages)
    3.  CWE Top 25 security weaknesses
  - [Discuss optimal content placement: blog vs. resource library](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Consider interactive or application-like experiences for target audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to rerun Screaming Frog crawl on live site](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Investigate Google Search Console data for migration impact](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide detailed diagnosis and mitigation steps for URL structure issues](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Evaluate and make recommendations for Registry page structure and content](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Develop sitemap strategy for large-scale Registry page indexing](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Ada to work on new content work streams and evaluate Registry pages](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Continue migration fixes while initiating new content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/obzqvUJ_MSERXQQ8YeSKjoRSGydTxNR_?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
